product.title: SMN — Secure Multi-agent Network
product.shortDescription: Deploy, govern, and scale AI agents safely with full audit trails and policy enforcement.
product.longDescription:
SMN is the neutral control and execution layer for production AI agent systems. It wraps every agent action in identity checks, policy enforcement, cost controls, and an immutable audit trail. Built for enterprises that need to move from AI pilot to governed production safely.

Key capabilities:
- Governed agent execution with 5-gate policy enforcement per tool call
- Hash-chained immutable audit trail (EU AI Act Art. 12 compliant)
- Per-tenant identity and scoped permission system
- FinOps cost tracking with per-task budgets
- Built-in compliance checking against EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF
- Multi-model LLM support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure, Google)
- YAML-based policy-as-code with risk classification
product.supportDescription: Email support included. Enterprise tier includes dedicated TAM.

dimensions.name: GovernedTasks
dimensions.description: Number of governed agent task executions
